arts.ttl: Wisdom Mike: Who is one of Bayern Munich's top academy talents?
arts.sum: On 27 January 2025, 16-year-old Wisdom Mike was invited by Vincent Kompany to train with Bayern Munich's first team for the very first time. Regarded as one of Bayern's premier academy talents, Kompany called him up to train with the first team on 27 January 2025 at the age of 16, ahead of their UEFA Champions League clash with Slovan Bratislava.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers relishing Celtic Champions League challenge as he gives Real Madrid or Bayern Munich draw reaction
arts.sum: It was a ding-dong clash with the Hoops now set to face one of two European giants to reach the last 16.

arts.ttl: Who Are Manchester City Playing in the Champions League Knockout Stage?
arts.sum: Manchester City avoided a catastrophic early exit from the Champions League and defeated Club Brugge to advance to the playoff round of the competition.

arts.ttl: Bayern see off Slovan Bratislava in unspectacular fashion
arts.sum: Bayern Munich concluded the league phase of the Champions League with a 3-1 win over Slovan Bratislava. As the win wasn't enough to get them into the top eight, the Bavarians will now go into the playoffs for the knockout phase.

arts.ttl: “You can never rule anything out” – Bayern Munich’s Christoph Freund on Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Bayern Munich’s Christoph Freund has commented on the future of Mathys Tel, who is expected to leave the Rekordmeister before Monday’s deadline. “You can never rule anything out 100 percent,”…

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs join 'three Premier League rivals' in race to sign Bayern Munich's Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly join three Premier League rivals in the race to sign Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Bayern Munich vs. Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: The lineups for Wednesday's Champions League clash between Bayern Munich and Slovan Bratislava have been announced.

arts.ttl: Will Alexander Nübel ever play for Bayern Munich again?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s signing of 21-year-old Köln keeper Jonas Urbig could spell the end of Alexander Nübel’s prospects in Bavaria. There are voices at Bayern who no longer believe that Alexander Nübel will ever play for the club again, especially after the signing of Jonas Urbig.

arts.ttl: Kingsley Coman looked past some unfortunate Harry Kane performances to appreciate his signing at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: One was the Champions League encounter in which Bayern utterly thrashed Tottenham Hotspur 7-2 in the Lilywhites’ own home, the other was the time Englishman missed a penalty as Coman’s France knocked Kane’s England out of 2022 World Cup. Still, having heard good things about the man before his arrival in Munich, it did not really surprise Coman to see him do what he has done: “The thing is you know sometimes between players you talk and everything and often before we had a conversation, when we had Lewandowski, and people were talking about Harry Kane - I knew he was good but the only time I played with him, against him was against Tottenham, and it was no match,” Coman admitted, via @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Champions League final group games: join us for updates on all 18 matches – live
arts.sum: Updates from a tantalising final round of games Manchester City v Club Brugge – live updates Live scoreboard | Who needs what | Email Scott Welcome to chaos. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round. Here are those fixtures … Aston Villa v Celtic Barcelona v Atalanta Bayer Leverkusen v Sparta Prague Bayern Munich v Slovan Bratislava Borussia Dortmund v Shakhtar Donetsk Brest v Real Madrid Dinamo Zagreb v AC Milan Girona v Arsenal Internazionale v Monaco Juventus v Benfica Lille v Feyenoord Manchester City v Club Brugge PSV v Liverpool Red Bull Salzburg v Atletico Madrid Sporting v Bologna Sturm Graz v RB Leipzig Stuttgart v Paris Saint-Germain Young Boys v Red Star Belgrade Continue reading...
